title: Romantic Saudi Arabian Oats Pilaf
description: A malty and springy Saudi Arabian dish featuring oats, sashimi-cut vegetables, and satvik-friendly ingredients, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning
Add the sashimi-cut carrots and zucchini, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally
Add the rolled oats, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and stir to combine
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the oats are toasted and the vegetables are tender
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes
Fluff the oats pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh parsley
Serve the Romantic Saudi Arabian Oats Pilaf hot, straight from the saucepan
